news.paragraph: Walmart is undergoing corporate restructuring with plans to lay off approximately 1,000 employees to accelerate AI-driven efficiency and improve margins. Traders should also monitor the upcoming earnings report to see if the company can continue to meet or exceed market estimates.
headlines: Will Walmart (WMT) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
